hero.description: Bridges the gap between digital CAD modeling and physical industrial fabrication. Founded by Raja Muhammad Ali Asghar, Ali CNC Pakistan specializes in 2D/2.5D vector creation, 3D relief modeling, and high-precision CNC manufacturing.

services.cad_desc: Technical 3D modeling and CNC-ready product design using cutting-edge tools like Onshape and Vectric.
services.cnc_desc: Expert programming for precise CNC fabrication, ensuring your designs are perfectly manufactured.
services.dfm_desc: Optimizing designs early in the process to reduce costs, improve quality, and speed up production.

why_choose.precision_desc: Every toolpath is double-checked for accuracy. We specialize in high-detail relief carving where every fraction of a millimeter counts.
why_choose.efficiency_desc: Our G-Code optimization ensures minimal material waste, saving you costs on expensive hardwoods and industrial materials.
why_choose.expertise_desc: Led by CEO Raja Muhammad Ali Asghar, who personally operates the machinery to ensure designs translate perfectly to the physical world.

faq.q1_title: What file formats do you provide?
faq.q1_desc: We provide CNC-ready files in various formats including .CRV, .DXF, .SVG, .STEP, and optimized G-Code tailored to your specific machine controller.
faq.q2_title: What is your typical turnaround time?
faq.q2_desc: Turnaround time varies by project complexity. Standard 2D toolpaths often take 24-48 hours, while complex 3D relief models may take 3-5 business days.
faq.q3_title: Do you offer design for manufacturing (DFM)?
faq.q3_desc: Yes, we optimize every design for manufacturing to reduce material waste, minimize machine time, and ensure zero on-machine errors.
faq.q4_title: Which software do you specialize in?
faq.q4_desc: We are experts in Vectric Aspire for wood fabrication and Onshape for advanced mechanical 3D modeling and CAD design.

experience.role1_desc: Led by Raja Muhammad Ali Asghar, specializing in bridging digital design with physical industrial fabrication.

footer.title: Let's Build Something Amazing
footer.description: Ready to turn your ideas into high-precision reality? Get in touch today.
footer.copyright: Ali CNC Pakistan. Based in Rawalpindi, Punjab. High-Precision Engineering & CAD Design.

contact.description: Have a project in mind? Whether it's a high-precision 3D model or a full CNC production run, Ali CNC Pakistan is ready to help you bring it to life.
